name: Holiday Sugar Cookie Gift Box – 12-Count
description: Twelve hand-decorated royal-iced sugar cookies in festive holiday designs. Each cookie is individually wrapped and packed in a kraft gift box with ribbon. Made fresh to order in Las Vegas, NV. Ships Monday–Wednesday only.

name: Holiday Cookie Sampler – 6-Count
description: Six assorted holiday decorated sugar cookies – snowflakes, trees, and ornaments in royal icing. Window-display gift box included.

name: Sugar Cookie Gift Box – 24-Count
description: Large 24-count holiday cookie gift box for corporate gifting, office parties, and cookie exchanges. Reinforced gift box with crinkle fill.

name: Quinceañera Celebration Cookie Set – 12-Count
description: Twelve custom royal-iced cookies for Quinceañera celebrations. Tiara, 15, floral rosette, butterfly, and high-heel designs. Specify color scheme via order notes.

name: Birthday Cookie Gift Box – 6-Count
description: Six birthday-themed hand-decorated sugar cookies. Cake, balloon, confetti, candle, present, and party hat designs. Add age or name in order notes.

name: Dia de los Muertos Cookie Gift Set – 6-Count
description: Six Dia de los Muertos decorated sugar cookies: sugar skull, marigold, candle, cross, and heart designs. Available October–November.

name: Event Dessert Table Cookie Set – 24-Count Custom
description: Twenty-four custom decorated sugar cookies for event dessert tables. Choose your theme and two designs. Contact us before ordering to confirm theme and availability.

name: Custom Bulk Cookie Order – Deposit (25+)
description: Deposit for bulk orders of 25 or more decorated sugar cookies. Contact us first to discuss your event, theme, and timeline. Balance due upon completion.
